hero.label: Made for Lamar Health
hero.headline: I want to help Lamar speed access to life changing medications.
hero.subheadline: I am excited by Lamar Health because you are tackling one of healthcare's most frustrating bottlenecks: the paperwork that delays expensive treatments. The Sales Coordinator and SDR role stands out to me because it sits right between customer need, operational detail, and growth, which is exactly where I do my best work.

whyCompany.title: You are solving a painful healthcare bottleneck with real urgency
whyCompany.body: Lamar is not selling a nice to have tool. You are removing prior authorizations, forms, and insurance red tape that can delay critical medications for patients who cannot afford to wait. That mission feels concrete, high impact, and easy to believe in.

whyCompany.title: Early stage means tight feedback loops and meaningful ownership
whyCompany.body: As a YC backed team with a small headcount, Lamar is still at the stage where each hire can shape how go to market and customer operations evolve. That is exciting to me because this role is not just about booking meetings, but about learning fast, improving process, and helping define how the team scales.

whyCompany.title: My outreach experience fits a consultative sales motion
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I ran cold outreach, used HubSpot and LinkedIn sequences, and helped acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I worked in a B2B consulting environment where clear messaging and understanding customer pain points mattered, which feels directly relevant to explaining Lamar's value to pharmacies and clinics.

quote: I want this role because Lamar is solving a problem that is messy, urgent, and worth solving well. I would be proud to help turn that mission into conversations, customer trust, and real growth.
